name: Impulse Life Chiropractic
tagline: Gentle chiropractic care for Sebastopol's families and athletes
seoDescription: Impulse Life Chiropractic in Sebastopol, CA. Dr. Kendell Jack offers gentle, personalized adjustments for families, athletes, and all ages. Book online today.

sections.heading: Restore movement, balance, and your body's natural ability to heal
sections.subheading: Dr. Kendell Jack provides gentle, personalized chiropractic adjustments in Sebastopol — caring for everyone from newborns to seniors.
badges: Led by Dr. Kendell Jack, Doctor of Chiropractic

sections.heading: About Impulse Life Chiropractic
body: Impulse Life Chiropractic is led by Dr. Kendell Jack, DC, a Doctor of Chiropractic dedicated to helping Sebastopol's families and athletes live healthier, more connected lives. After years of study and a vision for a true healing space, Dr. Jack opened his own clinic in Sebastopol to deliver care that supports the body's natural ability to thrive.

His approach centers on gentle, personalized adjustments that restore balance in the spine and nervous system, allowing the body to function at its best and heal naturally. Dr. Jack has had the privilege of working with people of all ages — from newborns to seniors — and also focuses on extremity care for the feet, ankles, and knees, because lasting movement starts at the ground.
highlights: Led by Dr. Kendell Jack, Doctor of Chiropractic
Care for all ages — newborns to seniors

sections.heading: How we help you move and feel better

items.title: Chiropractic Adjustments
items.description: Gentle, personalized spinal adjustments that restore balance to the spine and nervous system, helping your body function at its best and heal naturally.

items.title: Extremity Adjusting
items.description: Care for the feet, ankles, and knees — because movement starts at the ground. Hands-on adjusting to keep you mobile and balanced from the floor up.

items.title: Athlete & Sports Care
items.description: Chiropractic support built for active bodies, helping Sebastopol's athletes recover, move better, and stay in the game.

items.title: Family Chiropractic
items.description: Personalized care for the whole family, working with people of all ages from newborns to seniors in a welcoming, family-focused practice.

items.title: Nervous System & Wellness Care
items.description: Ongoing adjustments that support a balanced nervous system, helping you feel more connected, vibrant, and empowered in daily life.

items.title: New Patient Exams
items.description: A thorough first visit to understand your body and goals, so your care plan is tailored to you. New patients welcome — book your visit online.

items.title: Led By Dr. Kendell Jack, Doctor Of Chiropractic
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.
